# GEO Score — AI Local Visibility Auditor

## What This Tool Does

GEO Score audits how visible local businesses are to AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Google AI). It checks Name-Address-Phone (NAP) consistency across 5 major sources and generates optimized content for Google My Business.

**Key Features:**
- NAP Consistency Audit (5 sources: Google, Yelp, Facebook, LinkedIn, BBB)
- GEO Visibility Score (0-100)
- Optimized GMB content generation via AI
- Competitor analysis
- Review tracking and response generation
- JSON-LD schema for structured data
- Multi-business dashboard
- Downloadable audit reports

## API Documentation

### Endpoints

#### POST /api/audit
Audit a business's NAP consistency across directories.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "businessName": "Acme Plumbing",
  "city": "San Francisco",
  "state": "CA"
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "score": 82,
  "issues": ["Phone mismatch on Yelp", "Missing address on LinkedIn"],
  "entries": [
    {
      "source": "google",
      "name": "Acme Plumbing",
      "address": "123 Main St, San Francisco, CA 94105",
      "phone": "(415) 555-0100",
      "status": "match"
    }
  ],
  "canonical": {
    "name": "Acme Plumbing",
    "address": "123 Main St, San Francisco, CA 94105",
    "phone": "(415) 555-0100"
  }
}
```

#### POST /api/generate
Generate optimized Google My Business content.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "businessName": "Acme Plumbing",
  "city": "San Francisco",
  "state": "CA",
  "audit": { /* NAPAudit from /api/audit */ }
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "description": "Professional plumbing services...",
  "shortDescription": "Expert plumbing in San Francisco.",
  "keywords": ["plumber", "emergency plumbing", ...],
  "reviewTemplates": ["Thank you for the review!"],
  "schema": "{ JSON-LD LocalBusiness }"
}
```

#### POST /api/schema
Generate LocalBusiness JSON-LD schema.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "businessName": "Acme Plumbing",
  "city": "San Francisco",
  "state": "CA",
  "audit": { /* NAPAudit */ }
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "schemaJson": "{ @context: ... }"
}
```

#### POST /api/competitors
Find and rank competitor businesses.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "trade": "plumber",
  "city": "San Francisco",
  "state": "CA"
}
```

**Response:**
```json
[
  {
    "rank": 1,
    "name": "ABC Plumbing Co",
    "url": "https://...",
    "snippet": "Professional plumbing services...",
    "source": "abcplumbing.com"
  }
]
```

#### POST /api/reviews
Search for customer reviews from major platforms.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "businessName": "Acme Plumbing",
  "city": "San Francisco"
}
```

**Response:**
```json
[
  {
    "source": "yelp.com",
    "snippet": "Great service, highly recommend!",
    "rating": 5,
    "url": "https://..."
  }
]
```

#### POST /api/reviews/respond
Generate professional response templates for reviews.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "businessName": "Acme Plumbing",
  "city": "San Francisco",
  "reviews": [ /* ReviewResult array */ ]
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "responses": [
    "Thank you for choosing us!",
    "We appreciate your feedback..."
  ]
}
```

#### GET /api/directory
Get structured directory of all endpoints and capabilities.

**Response:** JSON object with tool metadata, all endpoints, example queries.

## Web Pages

- `/` — Main audit interface
- `/dashboard` — Multi-business management
- `/directory` — Public business directory (AI-readable)
- `/report` — Printable audit report
- `/api/directory` — Structured API documentation (JSON)

## Environment Variables

```
BRAVE_API_KEY=your_brave_api_key
GROQ_API_KEY=your_groq_api_key
GROQ_MODEL=llama-3.3-70b-versatile
```

## Example Workflow

1. Run audit: `POST /api/audit` with business details
2. Generate content: `POST /api/generate` with audit result
3. Get schema: `POST /api/schema` for structured data
4. Find reviews: `POST /api/reviews` to discover feedback
5. Generate responses: `POST /api/reviews/respond` for templates
6. Save to dashboard: Automatically saved to browser localStorage

## Data Persistence

All audits are saved to browser localStorage. No server-side database required. Exports available via `/dashboard`.

## For LLM Crawlers

- Start at: https://geo-score.com/directory (HTML directory page)
- API docs: https://geo-score.com/api/directory (JSON)
- LLM guide: https://geo-score.com/llms.txt (this file)
- Robots.txt: https://geo-score.com/robots.txt

The `/directory` page includes structured JSON-LD data for each business, making it easily parseable by LLM systems.

## Contact & Support

GEO Score helps local businesses optimize visibility for AI search engines.
Visit https://geo-score.com for more information.
